title: astragalus helveticus
intro: Astragalus helveticus, also known as milk vetch or Swiss astragalus, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-modulating effects. The health benefits of Astragalus helveticus include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing anti-aging and anti-cancer properties. Astragalus helveticus can be prepared as a dietary supplement in the form of capsules, tablets, or powder, or as a decoction or infusion, often in combination with other herbs.
